Why Choose Himachal Pradesh for Your Next Vacation?

Breathtaking Mountain Views and Scenic Valleys

From Shimla’s colonial charm to Kasol’s tranquil riversides, every corner of Himachal Pradesh offers postcard-perfect landscapes. Towering snow peaks, apple orchards, and rivers weaving through green valleys create the perfect escape from city life.
Travel Tip: Visit from April–June for vibrant greenery or December–February to experience snowfall and winter sports.

Adventure, Culture, and Nature in Harmony

Our Himachal tour packages from Kolkata include adventure experiences like trekking, paragliding, rafting, and mountain biking, alongside serene temple visits and cultural interactions. Nature lovers can explore pine forests, waterfalls, and scenic hiking trails.

packages.overview: Shimla, the Queen of Hills, offers a dreamy escape for honeymooners with its charming colonial architecture, snow-capped mountains, and romantic ambiance. This picturesque hill station is perfect for couples seeking serenity and scenic beauty. Stroll hand-in-hand along the Mall Road, enjoy panoramic views from Scandal Point, and visit the iconic Christ Church. Take a ride on the historic Kalka-Shimla toy train for a nostalgic journey through misty hills and pine forests. Cozy up in hillside resorts, relish candlelight dinners, and explore nearby spots like Kufri and Chail. Shimla promises a magical start to your new journey together.

Later, also enjoy your visit to the Himachal State Museum, which displays ancient artifacts in a Victorian mansion. The tour also gives you an opportunity to visit the Jakhu Temple / Jakhu Hill. After a tiresome day return back to your hotel room and enjoy a sound sleep during your overnight stay at the hotel.

packages.overview: Shimla, Manali, Dharamshala, and Dalhousie together create a mesmerizing Himachal Pradesh circuit, offering a perfect blend of natural beauty, adventure, and spiritual charm. Shimla enchants with its colonial architecture and vibrant Mall Road, while Manali captivates with snow-covered mountains, Solang Valley, and thrilling adventure sports. Dharamshala, home to the Dalai Lama, offers a serene spiritual escape amidst the Dhauladhar ranges, with Tibetan monasteries and peaceful vibes. Dalhousie, with its quaint charm and pine-covered hills, provides a romantic and relaxing atmosphere. This journey through Himachal’s most iconic destinations is ideal for couples, families, and nature enthusiasts seeking unforgettable mountain memories.

packages.overview: Shimla and Manali are two of Himachal Pradesh’s most beloved hill stations, offering a delightful mix of scenic beauty, colonial charm, and adventure. Shimla, once the summer capital of British India, enchants visitors with its historic buildings, bustling Mall Road, and panoramic views from spots like Kufri and Jakhoo Temple. Manali, set in the Kullu Valley, is a haven for nature lovers and thrill-seekers, with attractions like Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, and Hidimba Temple. Whether you’re enjoying snowfall, shopping for local handicrafts, or simply soaking in the mountain air, Shimla and Manali promise a memorable and refreshing Himalayan getaway.

packages.overview:
​Sightseeing Tour of Shimla & Kufri:
Explore Shimla’s colonial charm with visits to the Ridge, Mall Road, and Jakhoo Temple. Later, head to Kufri, known for its snow-capped slopes, adventure park, and stunning views.​Sightseeing Tour of Jibhi and Transfer to Manali:

Visit local gems like Jibhi Waterfall, Chehni Kothi, and ancient temples. Post exploration, head towards Manali, a favorite Himalayan escape.

Manali Sightseeing Tour:
Discover the charm of Hadimba Devi Temple, Old Manali, Vashisht Hot Springs, and enjoy a relaxing walk on Mall Road.

Excursion to Solang Valley:
Spend the day in Solang Valley, indulging in thrilling adventures like paragliding, ziplining, or skiing, depending on the season, or simply enjoy the majestic mountain views.

packages.overview:
• Shimla to Kufri Half Day Tour:
    Head out to Kufri, a quaint spot just outside Shimla known for its panoramic views, yak rides, and fun activities at the Kufri Fun World. Return to Shimla and enjoy the serene mountain evening.
  • Shimla to Sarahan:
    Drive through pine-clad hills and apple orchards to Sarahan, a peaceful village with stunning views of the snow-covered Himalayas. Visit the famous Bhimakali Temple, known for its unique architecture and spiritual vibe.
  • ​Tirthan Valley Full Day Tour:
    Explore the natural beauty of Tirthan with a visit to the Great Himalayan National Park, Jalori Pass, and Serolsar Lake. Enjoy short hikes, local village life, and the soothing sound of the river.​

packages.overview:
• Travel from Delhi to Shimla – scenic drive through the hills.
  • Explore Shimla and enjoy an excursion to Kufri, followed by an overnight stay in Shimla.
  • Drive from Shimla to Manali, enjoying the picturesque route.
  • Visit Solang Valley – famous for its snow activities and panoramic views.
  • Local sightseeing in Manali – temples, hot springs, and local markets.
  • Departure from Manali with beautiful memories of the trip.

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Manali – Reach the beautiful hill town and prepare for your Himalayan journey.

  2. Manali – Sarchu (222 km / 4000m) – Drive over scenic high mountain passes to the campsite at Sarchu.

  3. Sarchu – Leh (220 km) – Journey through rugged terrain crossing Nakee La, Lachung La, and Tanglang La.

  4. Drive Sham Valley & Alchi (70 km) – Explore Magnetic Hill, Sangam Point, and the ancient Alchi Monastery.

  5. Leh – Khardung La – Nubra Valley – Hunder Sand Dunes (120 km / 4–5 hrs) – Cross Khardung La and experience desert scenery and double-humped camels.

  6. Visit Diskit Monastery – Visit the 515-year-old hilltop monastery with stunning valley views.

  7. Nubra – Pangong Lake via Shey & Thiksey (155 km) – Drive through Shayok Valley with visits to iconic monasteries en route to the magical Pangong Lake.

  8. Pangong – Leh via Hemis Monastery (170 km) – Return to Leh, stopping at Hemis—the richest monastery in Ladakh.

  9. Depart Leh – Transfer to the airport for your onward flight with cherished memories.

After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will provide you with a packed lunch for the day as you embark on an enriching sightseeing tour.

Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, begin your journey with a visit to the 1,000-year-old Alchi Monastery, the only Gompa in Ladakh situated on flat ground, offering a glimpse into ancient Buddhist art and culture. Next, proceed to the Likir Monastery, where you’ll be awestruck by the splendid three-story Dharma Wheel Gompa and the massive Buddha statues dominating the landscape.

Continue to the spectacular Indus & Zanskar river Sangam, where the two rivers merge in a striking contrast of colors. Drive along the Indus River, visiting the revered Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and witnessing the mysterious phenomenon at Magnetic Hill, where cars appear to defy gravity.

Explore Basgo Palace, accessible via a short hike, and later, visit the Leh Hall of Fame, a museum dedicated to the bravery of Indian soldiers with memorabilia from the Kargil War.

Our best on-ground support staff will ensure a seamless experience throughout the day.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner included)

After a hearty breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you as you embark on an exciting journey to Nubra Valley, traversing the legendary Khardung La Pass (18,380 ft)—the highest motorable road in the world. Enjoy breathtaking views of the snow-clad mountains as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide shares fascinating insights about the region’s history and culture.

Arrive at Hundur by afternoon, where our best on-ground support staff will ensure a smooth check-in at your camp. After a delicious lunch, you’ll have the rest of the day free to explore Deskit and Hunder villages, immersing yourself in the unique charm of Ladakh.

In the evening, experience an unforgettable camel safari in the enchanting sand dunes between Deskit and Hunder Village, where the double-humped Bactrian camels add to the magical desert landscape.

Overnight stay at the camp. (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner included)

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Manali – Begin your trans-Himalayan adventure in the charming hill town of Manali.

  2. Manali – Sarchu (222 km / 4000 m) – Drive through the high passes of the Himalayas to reach Sarchu.

  3. Sarchu – Tsomoriri (220 km / 6 hrs) – Travel to the serene high-altitude Tsomoriri Lake, home to migratory birds.

  4. Tsomoriri – Leh (240 km / 7–8 hrs) – Scenic journey through remote landscapes and mountain passes to Leh.

  5. Drive to Sham Valley & Alchi (70 km) – Visit Sangam Point, Magnetic Hill, and the historic Alchi Monastery.

  6. Leh – Khardung La – Nubra Valley – Hunder (120 km / 4–5 hrs) – Cross the world’s highest motorable road into Nubra’s desert-like expanse.

  7. Visit Diskit Monastery – Explore Ladakh’s oldest monastery and its giant Maitreya Buddha statue.

  8. Nubra – Pangong Lake via Shey & Thiksey (155 km) – Drive through Shayok Valley and visit iconic monasteries en route to Pangong.

  9. Pangong – Leh via Hemis Monastery (170 km) – Return to Leh with a visit to the famous Hemis Monastery on the way.

  10. Depart Leh – Transfer to the airport with unforgettable memories of Ladakh’s majestic landscapes.

En route, with guidance from our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, you may spot wild animals roaming freely in their natural habitat. Pang is a tiny, seasonal market along the Leh-Manali route, operated by Ladakhi traders who migrate here from mid-June to September.

Crossing Pang, the journey continues uphill before reaching an expansive 60 km-long plain stretch, leading to the base of Tanglang La Pass (5,400 meters). Upon arrival at Tsomoriri, our team will facilitate a smooth check-in at your fixed camp.

Later, visit the picturesque lakefront and the small settlement of huts, soaking in the breathtaking beauty of Tsomoriri Lake, located 4,573 meters above sea level in southeast Leh. With its pearl-like shape and rich mineral deposits, the lake spans a 36 km circumference. Here, our best on-ground support staff will assist you in registering and obtaining the necessary permits.

Overnight stay at the camp.

After a delicious breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will provide you with a packed lunch for the day’s adventure. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, begin your sightseeing tour with a visit to the 1,000-year-old Alchi Monastery, the only Gompa in the Ladakh region situated on flat ground.

Next, proceed to the Likir Monastery, where you’ll be captivated by the magnificent three-storey Dharma Wheel Gompa and the awe-inspiring giant Buddha statues. Continue the journey to witness the breathtaking confluence of the Indus and Zanskar Rivers, a sight that will leave you spellbound.

Drive along the scenic Indus River, stopping to visit the sacred Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and experience the fascinating Magnetic Hill, where vehicles appear to defy gravity. The adventure continues with a hike to Basgo Palace, offering panoramic views of the Ladakhi landscape. Finally, visit the Leh Hall of Fame, a museum dedicated to the bravery of Indian soldiers, showcasing Kargil War memorabilia.

Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff will be available to assist you, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience.

Overnight stay at the hotel.

packages.overview: Discover the best of Himachal Pradesh with Travelxploria’s enchanting Manali & Dalhousie retreat. Begin your journey in Manali’s Kullu Valley, where snow-tipped peaks and whispering pine forests set the stage for heart-pounding adventures—soar over Solang Valley by paraglider, carve fresh tracks in the powder at Rohtang Pass, or ride the rapids of the Beas River. Then, drift into the colonial elegance of Dalhousie, where Travelxploria guides you through historic cantonment-style streets, lush meadows, and the “Mini Switzerland” of Khajjiar, dotted with crimson rhododendrons and serene lakes. Whether you’re chasing thrills in the mountains, strolling through British-era charm, or simply sipping chai as dusk paints the hills rose-gold, Travelxploria weaves every detail into a seamless, unforgettable Himalayan escape.

packages.overview: Discover the thrill and tranquility of the Himalayas with Travelxploria’s Manali & Kasol escape. Begin in Manali, where snow-dusted peaks and verdant pine forests set the stage for heart-pounding adventures—soar above Solang Valley on a paraglider, carve fresh tracks in winter at Rohtang Pass, or paddle through foaming rapids on the Beas River. Then we whisk you into the mystical Parvati Valley, centering in laid-back Kasol: wander riverside trails lined with cedar and apricot trees, sample Israeli-inspired cafés, and soak in the healing steam of the Manikaran hot springs. Throughout, Travelxploria handles every detail—from cozy mountain lodges to knowledgeable local guides—so you can lose yourself in Himalayan wonder, culture, and camaraderie.

packages.overview:
Manali Sightseeing:
Explore local attractions like Hadimba Temple, Manu Temple, and the charming streets of Old Manali. Stroll along the Mall Road for shopping and local food.

Solang Valley:
Head to Solang Valley for thrilling activities like paragliding, skiing (in season), and ATV rides, or just soak in the breathtaking views of snow-covered peaks and lush greenery.

​Tosh Exploration:
Wander through the village, enjoy panoramic views of the Parvati Valley, visit local cafés, and experience the tranquility and beauty of untouched nature.​

The journey from Manali to Kasol spans around 75 km and takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours by road. The drive is incredibly scenic, following the Beas and Parvati Rivers, winding through lush valleys and charming Himachali villages. As you descend from Manali, the vibe shifts from a bustling hill station to the peaceful, hippie charm of Kasol, nestled in the Parvati Valley. It’s a great spot to relax, explore riverside cafés, and connect with nature. Perfect for backpackers and peace seekers alike!

packages.package_name: Offbeat Manali, Kasol and Jibhi Tour
packages.overview:
• Solang Valley Excursion:
    Head out to the adventurous Solang Valley for activities like paragliding, ziplining, and ATV rides, or just relax and take in the spectacular Himalayan views.
  • Manali Half-Day Tour and Transfer to Kasol:
    In the morning, explore Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, and Mall Road. Later, drive to Kasol, a tranquil riverside village known for its bohemian feel and café culture.
  • Kasol Local Sightseeing + Jibhi Transfer:
    Stroll through Kasol’s local market, visit Manikaran Sahib for hot springs and spiritual vibes, then journey onwards to Jibhi, a quiet retreat tucked in the Tirthan Valley.
  • Jibhi Sightseeing and Waterfalls:
    Spend the day exploring Jibhi Waterfall, Chehni Kothi, and the surrounding forests. Soak in the calm, untouched beauty of the region.

packages.package_name: Himalayan Horizons: A Journey Through Himachal
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Manali – check-in and relax amidst the serene Himalayan surroundings.
  • Enjoy local sightseeing in Manali, including temples, Tibetan monasteries, and bustling markets.
  • Day trip from Manali to Kullu and Naggar – explore scenic beauty, cultural spots, and the famous Naggar Castle.
  • Travel from Manali to Dharamshala, soaking in the changing landscapes and mountain views.
  • Explore Dharamshala, visiting the Dalai Lama Temple, Bhagsunag Waterfall, and McLeod Ganj.
  • Departure from Dharamshala, carrying beautiful memories of the hills and culture.

packages.overview: Embark on a Himalayan odyssey with Travelxploria as your guide through the very best of Himachal Pradesh. From the adrenaline rush of paragliding over Manali’s Solang Valley and rafting the Beas River to the laid-back cool of Kasol’s pine-fringed trails, your adventure begins at every turn. Wander colonial-era boulevards in Shimla and Dalhousie, where crisp mountain air carries whispers of bygone Raj summers, then find spiritual calm amid the Tibetan monasteries of Dharamshala and McLeod Ganj. Finally, lose yourself in the stark, otherworldly beauty of Spiti Valley—its high-altitude deserts, ancient gompas, and glacial streams remind you that nature’s grandeur knows no bounds. With handpicked accommodations, expert local guides, and seamless transfers at every step, Travelxploria transforms this tapestry of snow-capped peaks, lush valleys, and vibrant culture into an unforgettable Himalayan sojourn.

• Arrive in Dalhousie and soak in the serene ambiance as you explore the local markets, colonial-era architecture, and scenic viewpoints.

packages.overview: Dharamshala, nestled in the majestic Dhauladhar range of Himachal Pradesh, is a serene hill station known for its spiritual ambiance, Tibetan culture, and stunning natural beauty. Home to the Dalai Lama, it serves as a peaceful retreat for seekers and travelers alike. The town is divided into Lower Dharamshala and the more popular McLeod Ganj, where colorful monasteries, Tibetan markets, and cozy cafes line the streets. Visitors can explore the Namgyal Monastery, Bhagsu Waterfall, and Triund Trek, offering breathtaking mountain views. Dharamshala’s blend of tranquility, spirituality, and scenic charm makes it a must-visit destination in the Himalayas.

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

overview:
Best Himachal Pradesh Tour Packages from Kolkata – Discover the Himalayan Paradise with Travelxploria

At sunrise, the snow-clad peaks of Himachal Pradesh glow golden against the clear Himalayan sky — a view that calls every traveler to explore nature’s masterpiece. With Travelxploria, one of the best tour and travel companies in India, your journey becomes more than a vacation — it’s a memory carved into mountain air and misty pine valleys.

Whether you’re planning a quick getaway, a romantic honeymoon, or a family adventure, our Himachal Pradesh tour packages from Kolkata are thoughtfully designed to match your travel style and budget.



Why Choose Himachal Pradesh for Your Next Vacation?

Breathtaking Mountain Views and Scenic Valleys

From Shimla’s colonial charm to Kasol’s tranquil riversides, every corner of Himachal Pradesh offers postcard-perfect landscapes. Towering snow peaks, apple orchards, and rivers weaving through green valleys create the perfect escape from city life.
Travel Tip: Visit from April–June for vibrant greenery or December–February to experience snowfall and winter sports.

Adventure, Culture, and Nature in Harmony

Our Himachal tour packages from Kolkata include adventure experiences like trekking, paragliding, rafting, and mountain biking, alongside serene temple visits and cultural interactions. Nature lovers can explore pine forests, waterfalls, and scenic hiking trails.

Perfect for Families, Couples & Solo Travelers

Choose from Himachal family tour packages, budget-friendly Himachal honeymoon packages, or adventure-based solo itineraries.
Families enjoy curated sightseeing and comfortable stays; couples find privacy in mountain-view cottages and candlelight dinners; solo travelers can explore with flexible schedules and local support.



Top Himachal Pradesh Tour Packages from Kolkata

5 Days Himachal Tour Package – Shimla & Manali Escape

A short, scenic getaway covering Shimla, Kufri, and Manali with guided sightseeing, Mall Road walks, and local cuisine experiences.

Himachal Pradesh Honeymoon Packages from Kolkata

Romantic experiences with cozy stays, snow views, and private sightseeing make this a favorite among couples. Starting at ₹12,500, these packages are designed for comfort, privacy, and unforgettable moments.

Budget-Friendly Himachal Pradesh Tour Packages from Kolkata

Explore major destinations without overspending. These packages include essential sightseeing, transport, and stays in handpicked 3-star hotels.

Customized Himachal Pradesh Tour Packages

Want something unique? Tailor your itinerary with Travelxploria — adjust duration, add adventure activities, or extend to Dharamshala and Kasol. As one of the best domestic and international travel agencies in Kolkata, we ensure flexibility and expert planning.



Must-Visit Destinations in Himachal Pradesh

  • Shimla – The Queen of Hills: Iconic colonial landmarks, Mall Road strolls, and panoramic ridge views.

  • Manali – Where Adventure Meets Serenity: Snow adventures at Solang Valley, Rohtang Pass, and cozy cafes by the Beas River.

  • Dharamshala & McLeod Ganj – Cultural & Spiritual Bliss: The Dalai Lama’s monastery, Tibetan art, and peaceful trails.

  • Kasol & Parvati Valley – Offbeat Escapes: Perfect for trekkers, nature photographers, and those seeking calm away from the crowd.



What’s Included in Travelxploria’s Himachal Pradesh Tour Packages

  • Comfortable accommodation (from deluxe hotels to cozy cottages)

  • Breakfast & dinner with multi-cuisine options

  • Private/scheduled transfers & sightseeing

  • Experienced local guides & optional adventure activities

  • Customizable itineraries for families, couples, or groups 



Best Time to Visit Himachal Pradesh

  • Summer (March–June): Ideal for sightseeing and outdoor activities.

  • Winter (Dec–Feb): Perfect for snowfall and honeymoon trips.

  • Monsoon (July–Sept): Great for budget travelers; fewer crowds and lush landscapes.



How to Book Himachal Pradesh Tour Packages from Kolkata at the Best Price

To get the best deals, book in advance or choose off-season Himachal tour packages. Travelxploria offers exclusive discounts for early bookings and group travelers.

You can explore and book your Himachal Pradesh tour package from Kolkata directly through Travelxploria.com, a trusted and recognized tour operator in India for both domestic and international travel. 



Frequently Asked Questions

1. What documents are required for Himachal Pradesh travel?
A valid government ID such as Aadhaar, Voter ID, or Passport is sufficient for all domestic tours.

2. Are your Himachal Pradesh tour packages suitable for elderly travelers?
Yes. We offer comfortable travel options with minimal trekking, doctor-on-call facilities, and accessible hotels.

3. Can I customize my itinerary?
Absolutely! Choose your destinations, activities, and hotel categories with our custom Himachal tour packages.

4. What’s the starting price for Himachal packages from Kolkata?
Prices start at ₹12,500 per person for 5-day tours covering Shimla and Manali, with premium upgrades available.

5. Do you provide Himachal honeymoon and family packages?
Yes — from budget stays to luxury experiences, our Himachal Pradesh honeymoon packages and family trips cater to every preference.



Plan Your Himalayan Escape with Travelxploria

From snowy peaks and pine-scented valleys to serene monasteries and thrilling adventures, Himachal Pradesh offers everything you seek in a mountain retreat.

Book your dream journey with Travelxploria — the best tour operator for Himachal Pradesh tour packages from Kolkata — and let our experts craft a seamless, joy-filled experience through India’s Himalayan paradise.
